profile.name: Deepak Kushwaha
profile.title: Solutions Architect & Full-Stack Developer
profile.tagline: I design and build reliable software that solves real business problems.
profile.about: Experienced technology professional with a track record of delivering enterprise solutions across cloud, web, and integration platforms. Passionate about clean architecture, automation, and turning complex requirements into simple, maintainable systems.

experience.description: Lead design and delivery of enterprise integration and cloud solutions for clients across multiple industries. Mentor developers and define technical standards.
Built and maintained customer-facing web applications and backend services. Drove adoption of CI/CD and automated testing.

certifications.name: Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert

projects.title: Enterprise Integration Platform
projects.description: A scalable integration layer connecting CRM, ERP, and third-party services with reliable messaging and monitoring.
